name: DrawingObject
summary: The DrawingObject class is an abstract base class for all the objects in the drawing. All drawing objects have a database identifier and belong to some view.

methods.name: Delete
methods.signature: public abstract bool Delete()
methods.summary: Deletes the instance from the database.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties(Dictionary<String, Double>.)
methods.signature: public bool GetDoubleUserProperties(out Dictionary<string, double> values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

params.name: values
params.doc: Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

returns.doc: True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no UserProperties were found).

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties(List<String>, Dictionary<String, Double>.)
methods.signature: public bool GetDoubleUserProperties(List<string> names, out Dictionary<string, double> values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

params.name: names
params.doc: List of names to get the values for.

params.name: values
params.doc: Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

returns.doc: True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no such UserProperties were found).

methods.name: GetDrawing
methods.signature: public Drawing GetDrawing()
methods.summary: Gets the drawing where the drawing object is.

returns.doc: The drawing where the drawing object is.

methods.name: GetIntegerUserProperties(Dictionary<String, Int32>.)
methods.signature: public bool GetIntegerUserProperties(out Dictionary<string, int> values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all integer user properties for the object with the given list of names.

params.name: values
params.doc: Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

returns.doc: True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no UserProperties were found).

methods.name: GetIntegerUserProperties(List<String>, Dictionary<String, Int32>.)
methods.signature: public bool GetIntegerUserProperties(List<string> names, out Dictionary<string, int> values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all integer user properties for the object with the given list of names.

params.name: names
params.doc: List of names to get the values for.

params.name: values
params.doc: Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

returns.doc: True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no such UserProperties were found).

methods.name: GetRelatedObjects()
methods.signature: public DrawingObjectEnumerator GetRelatedObjects()
methods.summary: Gets the related objects of the current object.

returns.doc: The related objects of the current object.

methods.name: GetRelatedObjects(.Type[])
methods.signature: public DrawingObjectEnumerator GetRelatedObjects(Type[] typeFilter)
methods.summary: Gets the related objects of the current object that are of certain types.

params.name: typeFilter
params.doc: The types of the objects to get.

returns.doc: The related objects of the current object that are of certain types.

methods.name: GetStringUserProperties(Dictionary<String, String>.)
methods.signature: public bool GetStringUserProperties(out Dictionary<string, string> values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all string user properties for the object with the given list of names.

params.name: values
params.doc: Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

returns.doc: True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no UserProperties were found).

methods.name: GetStringUserProperties(List<String>, Dictionary<String, String>.)
methods.signature: public bool GetStringUserProperties(List<string> names, out Dictionary<string, string> values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all string user properties for the object with the given list of names.

params.name: names
params.doc: List of names to get the values for.

params.name: values
params.doc: Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

returns.doc: True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no such UserProperties were found).

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Double.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref double Value)
methods.summary: Gets a double property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be gotten.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The value of the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was gotten successfully.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Int32.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref int Value)
methods.summary: Gets an integer property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be gotten.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The value of the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was gotten successfully.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, String.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref string Value)
methods.summary: Gets a string property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be gotten.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The value of the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was gotten successfully.

methods.name: GetView
methods.signature: public ViewBase GetView()
methods.summary: Gets the view where the drawing object is.

returns.doc: The view where the drawing object is.

methods.name: Insert
methods.signature: public abstract bool Insert()
methods.summary: Inserts the object instance into the database. The inserted instance must be of a real type.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.signature: public abstract bool IsEqual(Object ObjectToCompare)
methods.summary: Compares the current object with the given object. Checks every field of both objects for equality.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: An object of the same type to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: IsSameDatabaseObject
methods.signature: public virtual bool IsSameDatabaseObject(DatabaseObject Object)
methods.summary: Returns true if the current object and the given object are referencing the same database object.

params.name: Object
params.doc: The other object to be used.

returns.doc: True if the objects are referencing the same database object.

methods.name: Modify
methods.signature: public abstract bool Modify()
methods.summary: Modifies the instance in the database.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: Select
methods.signature: public abstract bool Select()
methods.summary: Selects the object instance from the database.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Double)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, double Value)
methods.summary: Sets a double property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, int Value)
methods.summary: Sets an integer property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, String)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, string Value)
methods.summary: Sets a string property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: ToString
methods.signature: public override string ToString()
methods.summary: Changes the string presentation of the drawing object.

returns.doc: The name of the current drawing object.

properties.name: Attributes
properties.summary: Gets or sets the attributes of the current object. Only attributes of the same type as the object are allowed.

properties.name: QueryReturnValue
properties.summary: Status information about the latest database operation (select, insert, modify, delete).
